title: taraxacum sardomontanum
intro: Taraxacum sardomontanum, also known as Sardinian dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Taraxacum sardomontanum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its roots and leaves can be used in tinctures or capsules for medicinal purposes.
